blended.narrative: Mount Snow is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,077 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing drizzle, highs of 37°F.
Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
